payload.answer: Commit the new employment update and mark the older Goldman employment fact as superseded, not current.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same person, Sam, and adds a newer employment state that supersedes the prior one.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
The prior memory 'Sam works at Goldman' is no longer current and should be marked superseded by the newer employment update.

details: Detected direct conflict between prior current employer and new employer update.
Classified as supersession because the new statement explicitly states Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
Prevented the older Goldman fact from remaining current.

repair_options: Store the new employment fact as current.
Mark 'Sam works at Goldman' as superseded or historical.
If the system supports temporal memory, attach past/current timestamps or status labels to both employment facts.

raw_text: {"intent":"update_memory","decision":"accept_with_supession","memory_cards":[{"kind":"fact","statement":"Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"employee"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"former_employer"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"current_employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"left","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"joined","object":"Point72"}]},{"kind":"supersession","statement":"The prior memory 'Sam works at Goldman' is no longer current and should be marked superseded by the newer employment update.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"employee"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"former_employer"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"current_employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"no_longer_works_at","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works_at","object":"Point72"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"reuse_existing_entity","entity_id":null,"reason":"The new statement refers to the same person, Sam, and adds a newer employment state that supersedes the prior one."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Commit the new employment update and mark the older Goldman employment fact as superseded, not current.","citations":[],"repair_options":["Store the new employment fact as current.","Mark 'Sam works at Goldman' as superseded or historical.","If the system supports temporal memory, attach past/current timestamps or status labels to both employment facts."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected direct conflict between prior current employer and new employer update.","Classified as supersession because the new statement explicitly states Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.","Prevented the older Goldman fact from remaining current."]}}
